message:
feat(node): TempFile orphan-on-drop, artifact/contract validation hardening, crypto parser expansion, and security fixes

TempFileGuard RAII (rollout_state, fleet_transport, root_pointer,
replay_bundle, main):
  All TempFileGuard guards now rename abandoned temp files to a UUID-
  suffixed .orphaned-<v7> path on drop rather than calling remove_file,
  preventing silent data loss if a crash exposes a temp file to concurrent
  readers. All atomic write sites switch from static .tmp suffix to
  .tmp-<uuid> for collision prevention. Extracts ensure_parent_dir and
  write_bytes_atomically helpers. Registry scan skips dot-prefixed dirs.
  Adds #[must_use] and doc comments to all guard structs.

Artifact identity validation (capability_artifact):
  AdmissionGate.admit() now validates all ArtifactIdentity fields before
  envelope checks — artifact_id, author, created_at (RFC 3339), and
  schema_version must be non-empty and trimmed. Reserved <unknown>
  sentinel is rejected. display_artifact_id() normalizes empty/reserved
  IDs in audit logs. Fixes CART_010 → CART_005 audit event code.

Contract field validation (artifact_contract):
  AdmissionGate.evaluate() validates all CapabilityContract and
  ExtensionArtifact fields — schema_version, contract_id, extension_id,
  signer_id must be non-empty/trimmed; issued_epoch_ms > 0; signature
  must be valid 64-char lowercase hex; capabilities non-empty; artifact
  payload_hash valid hex sha256. Adds InvalidContract denial reason.
  Makes with_signer() idempotent. Rewrites check_drift() to detect
  duplicate active capabilities via BTreeSet.

Crypto parsers (main):
  parse_signing_key_from_blob, parse_verifying_key_from_blob, and
  decode_signature_blob now accept: raw 32/64-byte buffers, hex (0x
  prefix, separators), all four base64 variants, prefix chains
  (ed25519:, base64:, hex: in any order), JSON objects/strings/arrays,
  and SSH authorized_keys format. 64-byte keypairs verified. ~60 tests.

Security fixes (config, main):
  Redact API key values from config merge logs (show "[N keys configured]"
  instead). Extract strip_repository_url_credentials() to strip
  user:password@ from HTTP/HTTPS/SSH URLs across all CI providers.

SSRF enforcement (engine_dispatcher):
  Forward SsrfEnforcementMode to fallback runtime via
  FRANKEN_ENGINE_NETWORK_SSRF_ENFORCEMENT env var.

Subprocess fix (main):
  Rewrite run_command_capture_stdout to drain pipes before checking exit
  status, fixing race where quick-exit processes lose output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
